mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.patient_id AS patientId, p.name AS patientName, o.visit_id AS visitId, o.total_amount AS totalAmount, o.paid_amount AS paidAmount, o.pay_type AS payType, o.pay_status AS payStatus, o.pay_time AS payTime, o.create_time AS createTime FROM charge_order o LEFT JOIN patient p ON p.id = o.patient_id WHERE o.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO charge_order (order_no, patient_id, visit_id, total_amount, paid_amount, pay_status, cashier_id) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{patientId}, #{visitId}, #{totalAmount}, #{paidAmount}, #{payStatus}, #{cashierId})
